package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_model_contains_binding_or_validate_tags: GORM models that accumulate transport validation and binding concerns.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule061NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule061NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule061NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario061Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule061NegativeService, input Rule061NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
